# ForgentFramework

> A technology-agnostic Multi-Agent Development Specification (`framework/00-multi-agent-development-spec.md`),
> applied via VS Code Copilot agents.

## What this is

ForgentFramework defines a universal Orchestrator → Executor → Critic workflow for running
software projects with AI agents. Spec is `framework/00-multi-agent-development-spec.md`; applied via VS Code Copilot `.agent.md` agents.

## Repository map

| Path | Description |
|---|---|
| `framework/00-multi-agent-development-spec.md` | Canonical spec: roles, pipeline phases, rubrics, Reflexion, traces, upgrade procedure |
| `framework/CHANGELOG.md` | Spec release notes shipped with the spec package |
| `framework/templates/bootstrap-agents-templates/` | Bootstrap agent prompt templates for installing/upgrading the framework in downstream repos |
| `AGENTS.md` | Machine-readable repo context — read first |
| `PROJECT.md` | Project parameters: stack (no code — Copilot agents only), models, rate limits |
| `.github/agents/` | System prompts: orchestrator, spec-editor, docs-critic, process-critic (`.agent.md` — VS Code Copilot agent definitions) |
| `.agents/skills/awesome-copilot-navigator/` | Skill package: safely navigate/adapt examples from awesome-copilot (license + provenance + safe-use rules) |
| `.agents/session/` | Gitignored per-session state: `.agents/session/<trace_id>/TASK_CONTEXT.md` |
| `.agents/traces/` | JSONL session traces (OTel GenAI format). Retention per `PROJECT.md` → Trace mode (Mode 1 committed in this repo) |
| `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | VS Code always-on context: workflow, constraints, active ADRs |
| `.github/AGENTS_CHANGELOG.md` | History of all agent prompt changes |
| `.github/SPEC_VERSIONING.md` | How this repo versions/releases spec changes (repo governance) |
| `.github/workflows/spec-versioning.yml` | CI guard for spec version bumps and changelog updates |
| `.github/decisions/` | ADR records — orchestrator checks these before every decomposition |

## Key concepts

- **Orchestrator**: decomposes task → routes `executor=<name>` → max 3 iterations → `TASK_COMPLETE` or `NEEDS_HUMAN`
- **Executor**: makes changes; reads `## Previous Attempts` in `TASK_CONTEXT.md` before each iteration (Reflexion)
- **Critic**: reads only final result (critic isolation); returns `APPROVE` / `REQUEST_CHANGES` / `REJECT`
- **TASK_CONTEXT.md**: per-session scratch file at `.agents/session/<trace_id>/TASK_CONTEXT.md` (gitignored); holds task, decomposition, previous attempts
- **trace_id**: collision-resistant session ID (recommended `YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ-<task-slug>-<rand4>`)
- **Trace**: JSONL line per agent operation appended to `.agents/traces/<trace_id>.jsonl` (retention per `PROJECT.md` → Trace mode)

## Running

```bash
# Open repo in VS Code, use Copilot Chat in Agent mode, select forgent-orchestrator
```

## Constraints

- No secrets in committed files

## Spec version

See `framework/00-multi-agent-development-spec.md` header for current version.
